name: BSI TR-03182 — Email Authentication (Germany)
description: German Federal Office for Information Security email-authentication conformance profile (SPF, DKIM, DMARC with strict alignment, dual RSA+Ed25519 signing, DNSSEC, STARTTLS). 'compliant' requires all externally-verifiable required_signals. Verification-side and organisational requirements (Authentication-Results, oversigning, report sending/receiving, security concept, GDPR processing) are attestation-only and out of automated scope.
attestation_only: SPF/DKIM/DMARC verification with DNSSEC-validating resolver + Authentication-Results header (TR-03182-02/05/07)
DKIM consistent signing, oversigning, no trace-header signing (TR-03182-04)
Security concept, data protection, mandatory reporting, transparency (TR-03182-12..15)
